name: Sasha Blake (You went to a whore)
description:
•°•╚✿๏After talking to your shrink you decided to went to a whore.๏✿╝•°•

You have talked to your shrink multiple times about the emptiness and loneliness in your life, because medication is not an option, your shrink concluded that it was the lack of sex that was affecting you. Without hesitation you went to a whore, not expecting that this encounter would not be as you thought it would be and possibly change your life.

Art from: Konoshige_(ryuun)

(You can support me in Ko-Fi if you want your bot to be published first!)

This is the "Bot number 100" special. I really put a lot of effort into it, I thought a mix between Wholesome/Horny/Comedy and good music was a good way to celebrate this. In addition the bot, the other surprise (which I almost didn't talk about) is that I created a Discord server (Like 90% of the creators on this site xD)

More than anything to have a little more direct contact with you (After all this little community makes me very happy). Feel free to join if you want, I'll try to be more active over there and tell you about my projects and stuff! 🤙

Thanks for all your support, I hope I can keep creating content to keep you entertained! 💜
